This Slender wallet is made from Brushed Monogram calfskin, featuring a vintage texture for a refined look. It includes card slots and a bill compartment, easily fitting into most pockets.

items.name_en: 【Passport Holder】M64502 62089 Black/Floral (Vintage)
items.name_cn:
【Passport Holder】M64502 62089 Black/Floral (Vintage)
The slender design fits neatly into various pockets, exuding the charm of the 'Portefeuille Slender'. Made from brushed Monogram calfskin, it has a treasure-like expression. The worn leather patina and faded Monogram pattern evoke a depth reminiscent of a life lived through time. With 4 card slots and a bill compartment, it is perfect for daily use.
Size: 10.0x14.0x2.0 cm

items.name_en: 【BRAZZA Card Case Organizer】M62665 66540 Black Flower (Vintage)
items.name_cn:
【BRAZZA Card Case Organizer】M62665 66540 Black Flower (Vintage)
This "Card Case Organizer De Posh" features Blush Monogram cowhide with faded Monogram patterns and used Patina (shadows). The texture reminiscent of weathered leather saddles highlights a minimalist beauty. Easily fits into a coat pocket. Holds coins, credit cards, and bills.
Size: 19x10 cm

items.name_en: M81561 Black
items.name_cn:
M81561 Black
Crafted from grained Taurillon leather, this piece features a color contrast between the inside and outside. The LV letter slide buckle references the Capucines handbag's closure design. items.name_en: !!️《With Complete Original Green Box Packaging》!!️ GG Detail Wallet. Gucci leather goods break design boundaries, constantly reinterpreting classic pieces in a personal way. This men's wallet combines classic GG Supreme canvas with green GG accessories to create a refined accessory for modern fashion. Beige and Ebony GG Supreme canvas, green leather trim, brass hardware with green ceramic finish, GG detail cloud print fabric lining. Inside: card slot, coin pocket, 1 bill compartment. Model: 768244. Closed dimensions: 11 (W) x 9cm (H). Open dimensions: 21 (W) x 9cm (H). Color: Cognac/Brown PVC. Italian creation. Weight: approx. 0.045 kg
